dleplugin.name: DLE Real Series PRO
dleplugin.description: DLE Real Series PRO v7.0 — Hiyerarşik Dizi/Sezon/Bölüm yönetimi. TMDB otomatik çekme, SEO şablonları, resim indirme motoru, watermark, taslak/yayın modu, varsayılan kategoriler, otomatik tag, TR→EN fallback, Cron motoru (Returning Series takibi), tüm xfie
dleplugin.mysqlenable: REPLACE INTO `{prefix}_admin_sections` (`name`, `title`, `descr`, `icon`, `allow_groups`) VALUES ('series_admin', 'Dizi Yönetimi', 'DleHub Modern Config Tabanlı Dizi Yönetimi', 'series_icon.png', '1');
dleplugin.mysqldelete: ALTER TABLE `{prefix}_post` DROP `is_series`, DROP `series_parent`, DROP `series_season`, DROP `series_episode`; DELETE FROM `{prefix}_admin_sections` WHERE name='series_admin';

Resim ID Bölüm Başlığı S / B İşlem
1. Temel API ve Limit Ayarları
Türkçe özet bulunamazsa hangi dilden çekilsin?
Sistemi yormamak için maksimum kaç oyuncu çekilsin? (Önerilen: 15)
2. Medya ve Depolama (Storage)
Sadece "Sunucuya İndir" seçiliyse çalışır.
3. Yayın ve Otomatik SEO Kuralları
Toplu çekimlerde spamı önlemek için Taslak önerilir.
4. Cronjob (Otomatik Bölüm Takip Motoru)
Cron URL: index.php?controller=ajax&mod=series_cron&key=
5. XFields (İlave Alan) Eşleştirme Haritası
A. ANA DİZİ VERİLERİ (Sadece Dizi Çekildiğinde Dolar)
B. SEZON VERİLERİ (Sadece Sezon Çekildiğinde Dolar)
C. BÖLÜM VERİLERİ (Sadece Bölüm Çekildiğinde Dolar)

'Hash Error'])); include_once (DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/modules/functions.php')); $s_conf = include ENGINE_DIR.'/data/series_config.php'; $api_key = $s_conf['tmdb_api_key']; $xf_map = $s_conf['xf_map']; $action = $_POST['action']; // --- DİNAMİK AYARLARIN OKUNMASI --- $approve_status = (isset($s_conf['pub_status']) && $s_conf['pub_status'] == 0) ? 0 : 1; $cast_limit = isset($s_conf['api_cast_limit']) ? intval($s_conf['api_cast_limit']) : 15; $lang_fallback = isset($s_conf['api_lang_fallback']) ? $s_conf['api_lang_fallback'] : 'en-US'; $seo_tags_sync = (isset($s_conf['seo_tags_sync']) && $s_conf['seo_tags_sync'] == 1) ? true : false; $tpl_series = !empty($s_conf['seo_series']) ? $s_conf['seo_series'] : '{title}'; $tpl_season = !empty($s_conf['seo_season']) ? $s_conf['seo_season'] : '{title} {season}. Sezon'; $tpl_episode = !empty($s_conf['seo_episode']) ? $s_conf['seo_episode'] : '{title} {season}. Sezon {episode}. Bölüm'; // ----------------------------------- // cURL + timeout korumalı, fallback destekli TMDB istek fonksiyonu if (!function_exists('fetch_tmdb_data_secure')) { function fetch_tmdb_data_secure($url) { if (function_exists('curl_init')) { $ch = curl_init(); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 15); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0'); $r = curl_exec($ch); $code = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE); curl_close($ch); if ($code == 200 && $r) return $r; } $ctx = stream_context_create(['http' => ['timeout' => 15]]); return @file_get_contents($url, false, $ctx) ?: '{}'; } } // DLE XField Kırılmalarını Önleyen Zırh Fonksiyonu function safe_xf($v) { if(is_array($v)) $v = implode(', ', $v); return str_replace(['|', "\r", "\n"], ['|', '', '
'], trim($v)); } // YENİ: DİNAMİK RESİM İNDİRME MOTORU (STORAGE ENGINE) function process_tmdb_image($path) { global $s_conf, $config; if (empty($path)) return ''; // Boyut ayarı (w500, w780, original) $size = isset($s_conf['img_size']) && !empty($s_conf['img_size']) ? $s_conf['img_size'] : 'original'; $tmdb_url = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/" . $size . $path; // Sunucuya İndir seçiliyse if (isset($s_conf['img_download']) && $s_conf['img_download'] == 1) { $save_dir = isset($s_conf['img_path']) && !empty($s_conf['img_path']) ? trim($s_conf['img_path'], '/') . '/' : 'uploads/posts/series/'; $full_dir = ROOT_DIR . '/' . $save_dir; // Klasör yoksa oluştur if (!is_dir($full_dir)) { @mkdir($full_dir, 0777, true); @chmod($full_dir, 0777); } $ext = pathinfo($path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION); if (empty($ext)) $ext = 'jpg'; // Benzersiz dosya ismi oluştur $filename = 'tmdb_' . substr(md5($path . time()), 0, 12) . '.' . $ext; $save_path = $full_dir . $filename; // cURL ile resmi diske yazma $ch = curl_init($tmdb_url); $fp = fopen($save_path, 'wb'); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FILE, $fp); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_HEADER, 0); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, 1); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 15); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false); curl_exec($ch); curl_close($ch); fclose($fp); // İndirme başarılıysa if (file_exists($save_path) && filesize($save_path) > 0) { // Watermark istenmiş mi kontrol et ve DLE sınıfını çağır if (isset($s_conf['img_watermark']) && $s_conf['img_watermark'] == 1) { if (file_exists(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/thumb.class.php'))) { require_once DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/thumb.class.php'); $thumb = new thumbnail($save_path); $thumb->insert_watermark($config['max_watermark']); $filename = basename($thumb->save($save_path) ?: $save_path); } } // Sitenin lokal linkini döndür return $config['http_home_url'] . $save_dir . $filename; } } // İndirme kapalıysa veya hata olduysa TMDB linkini döndür return $tmdb_url; } function build_xfields($data, $map, $c_limit) { $xf = []; $simple_keys = ['original_name','original_language','status','tagline','homepage','popularity','vote_average','vote_count','first_air_date','last_air_date','number_of_seasons','number_of_episodes']; foreach($simple_keys as $k) { if(!empty($map[$k]) && isset($data[$k])) $xf[] = $map[$k]."|".safe_xf($data[$k]); } // Temel TV Verileri if(!empty($map['year']) && !empty($data['first_air_date'])) $xf[] = $map['year']."|".substr($data['first_air_date'], 0, 4); if(!empty($map['adult']) && isset($data['adult'])) $xf[] = $map['adult']."|".($data['adult']?'1':'0'); if(!empty($map['in_production']) && isset($data['in_production'])) $xf[] = $map['in_production']."|".($data['in_production']?'1':'0'); if(!empty($map['episode_run_time']) && !empty($data['episode_run_time'])) $xf[] = $map['episode_run_time']."|".safe_xf(implode(',',$data['episode_run_time'])); // MOTOR ENTEGRASYONU: Resimler artık process_tmdb_image üzerinden geçiyor if(!empty($map['poster_path']) && !empty($data['poster_path'])) $xf[] = $map['poster_path']."|".process_tmdb_image($data['poster_path']); if(!empty($map['backdrop_path']) && !empty($data['backdrop_path'])) $xf[] = $map['backdrop_path']."|".process_tmdb_image($data['backdrop_path']); // TV EKSTRA ŞEMA if(!empty($map['tv_type']) && !empty($data['type'])) $xf[] = $map['tv_type']."|".safe_xf($data['type']); if(!empty($map['languages']) && !empty($data['languages'])) $xf[] = $map['languages']."|".safe_xf(implode(', ',$data['languages'])); if(!empty($map['last_episode_to_air']) && !empty($data['last_episode_to_air'])) { $le = $data['last_episode_to_air']; $xf[] = $map['last_episode_to_air']."|".safe_xf($le['name']." (S".$le['season_number']." B".$le['episode_number'].") - ".$le['air_date']); } if(!empty($map['next_episode_to_air']) && !empty($data['next_episode_to_air'])) { $ne = $data['next_episode_to_air']; $xf[] = $map['next_episode_to_air']."|".safe_xf($ne['name']." (S".$ne['season_number']." B".$ne['episode_number'].") - ".$ne['air_date']); } // Diziler/Koleksiyonlar (Gelişmiş Cast/Crew) $arrs = ['genres'=>'genres', 'cast'=>'credits.cast', 'created_by'=>'created_by', 'production_companies'=>'production_companies', 'production_countries'=>'production_countries', 'networks'=>'networks', 'spoken_languages'=>'spoken_languages', 'origin_country'=>'origin_country']; foreach($arrs as $k=>$path) { if(empty($map[$k])) continue; $v = $data; foreach(explode('.',$path) as $p) $v=isset($v[$p])?$v[$p]:[]; if(!empty($v)) { $vals=[]; foreach($v as $i) { if($k=='cast') { if(count($vals) >= $c_limit) break; $vals[] = $i['name']; } elseif($k=='created_by') $vals[]=$i['name']; elseif($k=='spoken_languages') $vals[]=isset($i['english_name'])?$i['english_name']:$i['name']; elseif($k=='origin_country') $vals[]=$i; else $vals[] = isset($i['name'])?$i['name']:$i; } if(!empty($vals)) $xf[] = $map[$k]."|".safe_xf(implode(', ',$vals)); } } // Sertifika if(!empty($map['age_limit']) && !empty($data['content_ratings']['results'])) { $r=''; foreach($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $res){ if($res['iso_3166_1']=='TR') { $r=$res['rating']; break; } } if(!$r) { foreach($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $res){ if($res['iso_3166_1']=='US') { $r=$res['rating']; break; } } } if($r) $xf[] = $map['age_limit']."|".safe_xf($r); } // Sağlayıcılar if(!empty($map['watch_providers_tr']) && !empty($data['watch/providers']['results']['TR']['flatrate'])) { $providers = array_map(function($p){ return $p['provider_name']; }, $data['watch/providers']['results']['TR']['flatrate']); if(!empty($providers)) $xf[] = $map['watch_providers_tr']."|".safe_xf(implode(', ', $providers)); } return implode('||', $xf); } function get_xf_img($xf,$key){ if(empty($key))return'engine/skins/images/no_image.png'; if(preg_match('/'.preg_quote($key,'/').'\|(.*?)(?:\|\||$)/',$xf,$m))return trim($m[1]); return 'engine/skins/images/no_image.png'; } function get_tmdb_id_safe($xf){ if(preg_match('/series_tmdb_id\|(.*?)(?:\|\||$)/',$xf,$m))return trim($m[1]); return ''; } header('Content-Type: application/json'); $q = isset($_POST['q']) ? $db->safesql(trim(strip_tags($_POST['q']))) : ''; if ($action == 'list_diziler') { $where = "WHERE p.is_series = 1"; if($q) $where .= " AND p.title LIKE '%$q%'"; $limit = $q ? "LIMIT 100" : "ORDER BY p.title ASC"; $db->query( "SELECT p.id, p.title, p.xfields, (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE is_series=2 AND series_parent=p.id) as s_count, (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE is_series=3 AND series_parent=p.id) as e_count FROM ".PREFIX."_post p $where $limit" ); $d=[]; while($r=$db->get_row()) { $d[]=['id'=>$r['id'],'title'=>stripslashes($r['title']),'tmdb_id'=>get_tmdb_id_safe($r['xfields']),'img'=>get_xf_img($r['xfields'],$xf_map['poster_path']), 's_count'=>intval($r['s_count']), 'e_count'=>intval($r['e_count'])]; } echo json_encode($d); exit; } if ($action == 'list_sezonlar') { $where = "p.is_series=2"; if($q) $where .= " AND p.title LIKE '%$q%'"; $limit = $q ? "LIMIT 100" : "ORDER BY p.id DESC LIMIT 30"; $db->query("SELECT p.id, p.title, p.xfields, p.series_parent, p.series_season, (SELECT title FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE id=p.series_parent) as dt, (SELECT xfields FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE id=p.series_parent) as dx, (SELECT COUNT(id) FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE is_series=3 AND series_parent=p.series_parent AND series_season=p.series_season) as e_count FROM ".PREFIX."_post p WHERE $where $limit"); $d=[]; while($r=$db->get_row()) { $d[]=['id'=>$r['id'],'title'=>stripslashes($r['title']),'series_parent'=>$r['series_parent'],'series_season'=>$r['series_season'],'dizi_title'=>stripslashes($r['dt']),'tmdb_id'=>get_tmdb_id_safe($r['dx']),'img'=>get_xf_img($r['xfields'],$xf_map['season_poster']) ? get_xf_img($r['xfields'],$xf_map['season_poster']) : get_xf_img($r['xfields'],$xf_map['poster_path']), 'e_count'=>intval($r['e_count'])]; } echo json_encode($d); exit; } if ($action == 'list_bolumler') { $where = "p.is_series=3"; if($q) $where .= " AND p.title LIKE '%$q%'"; $limit_sql = $q ? Bölüm'; // ----------------------------------- // cURL + timeout korumalı, fallback destekli TMDB istek fonksiyonu if (!function_exists('fetch_tmdb_data_secure')) { function fetch_tmdb_data_secure($url) { if (function_exists('curl_init')) { $ch = curl_init(); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 15); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0'); $r = curl_exec($ch); $code = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE); curl_close($ch); if ($code == 200 && $r) return $r; } $ctx = stream_context_create(['http' => ['timeout' => 15]]); return @file_get_contents($url, false, $ctx) ?: '{}'; } } // DLE XField Kırılmalarını Önleyen Zırh Fonksiyonu function safe_xf($v) { if(is_array($v)) $v = implode(', ', $v); return str_replace(['|', "\r", "\n"], ['|', '', '
'], trim($v)); } // YENİ: DİNAMİK RESİM İNDİRME MOTORU (STORAGE ENGINE) function process_tmdb_image($path) { global $s_conf, $config; if (empty($path)) return ''; // Boyut ayarı (w500, w780, original) $size = isset($s_conf['img_size']) && !empty($s_conf['img_size']) ? $s_conf['img_size'] : 'original'; $tmdb_url = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/" . $size . $path; // Sunucuya İndir seçiliyse if (isset($s_conf['img_download']) && $s_conf['img_download'] == 1) { $save_dir = isset($s_conf['img_path']) && !empty($s_conf['img_path']) ? trim($s_conf['img_path'], '/') . '/' : 'uploads/posts/series/'; $full_dir = ROOT_DIR . '/' . $save_dir; // Klasör yoksa oluştur if (!is_dir($full_dir)) { @mkdir($full_dir, 0777, true); @chmod($full_dir, 0777); } $ext = pathinfo($path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION); if (empty($ext)) $ext = 'jpg'; // Benzersiz dosya ismi oluştur $filename = 'tmdb_' . substr(md5($path . time()), 0, 12) . '.' . $ext; $save_path = $full_dir . $filename; // cURL ile resmi diske yazma $ch = curl_init($tmdb_url); $fp = fopen($save_path, 'wb'); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FILE, $fp); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_HEADER, 0); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION, 1); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 15); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false); curl_exec($ch); curl_close($ch); fclose($fp); // İndirme başarılıysa if (file_exists($save_path) && filesize($save_path) > 0) { // Watermark istenmiş mi kontrol et ve DLE sınıfını çağır if (isset($s_conf['img_watermark']) && $s_conf['img_watermark'] == 1) { if (file_exists(DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/thumb.class.php'))) { require_once DLEPlugins::Check(ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/thumb.class.php'); $thumb = new thumbnail($save_path); $thumb->insert_watermark($config['max_watermark']); $filename = basename($thumb->save($save_path) ?: $save_path); } } // Sitenin lokal linkini döndür return $config['http_home_url'] . $save_dir . $filename; } } // İndirme kapalıysa veya hata olduysa TMDB linkini döndür return $tmdb_url; } function build_xfields($data, $map, $c_limit) { $xf = []; $simple_keys = ['original_name','original_language','status','tagline','homepage','popularity','vote_average','vote_count','first_air_date','last_air_date','number_of_seasons','number_of_episodes']; foreach($simple_keys as $k) { if(!empty($map[$k]) && isset($data[$k])) $xf[] = $map[$k]."|".safe_xf($data[$k]); } // Temel TV Verileri if(!empty($map['year']) && !empty($data['first_air_date'])) $xf[] = $map['year']."|".substr($data['first_air_date'], 0, 4); if(!empty($map['episode_run_time']) && !empty($data['episode_run_time'])) $xf[] = $map['episode_run_time']."|".safe_xf(implode(',',$data['episode_run_time'])); // MOTOR ENTEGRASYONU: Resimler artık process_tmdb_image üzerinden geçiyor if(!empty($map['poster_path']) && !empty($data['poster_path'])) $xf[] = $map['poster_path']."|".process_tmdb_image($data['poster_path']); if(!empty($map['backdrop_path']) && !empty($data['backdrop_path'])) $xf[] = $map['backdrop_path']."|".process_tmdb_image($data['backdrop_path']); // TV EKSTRA ŞEMA if(!empty($map['tv_type']) && !empty($data['type'])) $xf[] = $map['tv_type']."|".safe_xf($data['type']); (S".$ne['season_number']." foreach($arrs as $k=>$path) { if(empty($map[$k])) continue; $v = $data; foreach(explode('.',$path) as $p) $v=isset($v[$p])?$v[$p]:[]; if(!empty($v)) { $vals=[]; foreach($v as $i) { if($k=='cast') { if(count($vals) >= $c_limit) break; $vals[] = $i['name']; } elseif($k=='created_by') $vals[]=$i['name']; elseif($k=='spoken_languages') $vals[]=isset($i['english_name'])?$i['english_name']:$i['name']; elseif($k=='origin_country') $vals[]=$i; else $vals[] = isset($i['name'])?$i['name']:$i; } if(!empty($vals)) $xf[] = $map[$k]."|".safe_xf(implode(', ',$vals)); } } // Sertifika if(!empty($map['age_limit']) && !empty($data['content_ratings']['results'])) { $r=''; foreach($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $res){ if($res['iso_3166_1']=='TR') { $r=$res['rating']; break; } } if(!$r) { foreach($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $res){ if($res['iso_3166_1']=='US') { $r=$res['rating']; break; } } } if($r) $xf[] = $map['age_limit']."|".safe_xf($r); } // Sağlayıcılar if(!empty($map['watch_providers_tr']) && !empty($data['watch/providers']['results']['TR']['flatrate'])) { $providers = array_map(function($p){ return $p['provider_name']; "_post_extras_cats (news_id, cat_id) VALUES ('{$new_e_id}', '{$cat}')" ); $added_e++; } } } } if($added_s > 0 || $added_e > 0) clear_cache(); echo json_encode(['success'=>true, 'msg'=>"✅ Tüm Hiyerarşi Tarandı!\nEklendi: $added_s Sezon, $added_e Bölüm\nAtlandı: $skipped_e Zaten Ekli Bölüm"]); exit; } if ($action == 'get_tmdb_seasons') { $tid = intval($_POST['tmdb_id']); $res = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}?api_key={$api_key}&language=tr-TR"), true); if (empty($res['seasons'])) { $res = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang_fallback}"), true); } // TR boş season overview'larını fallback dilden doldur if (!empty($res['seasons'])) { $res_fb = null; foreach ($res['seasons'] as &$s) { if (empty($s['overview'])) { if (!$res_fb) $res_fb = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang_fallback}"), true); if (!empty($res_fb['seasons'])) { foreach ($res_fb['seasons'] as $sf) { if ($sf['season_number'] == $s['season_number'] && !empty($sf['overview'])) { $s['overview'] = $sf['overview']; break; } } } } } unset($s); } echo json_encode(['seasons' => isset($res['seasons']) ? $res['seasons'] : []]); exit; } if ($action == 'get_tmdb_episodes') { $tid = intval($_POST['tmdb_id']); $sno = intval($_POST['season_no']); $res = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}/season/{$sno}?api_key={$api_key}&language=tr-TR"), true); $res_fb = null; // Bölüm bazında TR boşsa fallback dilden doldur if (!empty($res['episodes'])) { foreach ($res['episodes'] as &$ep) { if (empty($ep['name']) || empty($ep['overview'])) { if (!$res_fb) $res_fb = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}/season/{$sno}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang_fallback}"), true); if (!empty($res_fb['episodes'])) { foreach ($res_fb['episodes'] as $epf) { if ($epf['episode_number'] == $ep['episode_number']) { if (empty($ep['name']) && !empty($epf['name'])) $ep['name'] = $epf['name']; if (empty($ep['overview']) && !empty($epf['overview'])) $ep['overview'] = $epf['overview']; if (empty($ep['still_path']) && !empty($epf['still_path'])) $ep['still_path'] = $epf['still_path']; break; } } } } } unset($ep); } elseif (empty($res['episodes'])) { $res = json_decode(fetch_tmdb_data_secure("https://api.themoviedb.org/3/tv/{$tid}/season/{$sno}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang_fallback}"), true); } echo json_encode(['episodes' => isset($res['episodes']) ? $res['episodes'] : []]); exit; } if ($action == 'delete_item') { $db->query("DELETE FROM ".PREFIX."_post WHERE id='".intval($_POST['id'])."'"); $db->query("DELETE FROM ".PREFIX."_post_extras WHERE news_id='".intval($_POST['id'])."'"); $db->query("DELETE FROM ".PREFIX."_post_extras_cats WHERE news_id='".intval($_POST['id'])."'"); clear_cache(); echo json_encode(['success'=>true]); exit; } ?>

<?php
if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE')) die("Hacking attempt!");
if (!isset($_POST['user_hash']) || $_POST['user_hash'] != $dle_login_hash) die(json_encode(['error' => 'Auth Error']));

$s_conf = file_exists(ENGINE_DIR . '/data/series_config.php') ? include ENGINE_DIR . '/data/series_config.php' : ['tmdb_api_key' => ''];
$api_key = isset($s_conf['tmdb_api_key']) ? $s_conf['tmdb_api_key'] : '';

if (empty($api_key)) {
    die(json_encode(['error' => 'TMDB API Key eksik. Lütfen Dizi Yönetimi ayarlarından API anahtarınızı girin.']));
}

$tmdb_id = intval($_POST['tmdb_id']);
$type    = intval($_POST['type']);

// cURL + timeout korumalı, fallback destekli istek fonksiyonu
function fetch_tmdb($url) {
    if (function_exists('curl_init')) {
        $ch = curl_init();
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_URL, $url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 10);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0');
        $res = curl_exec($ch);
        $code = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE);
        curl_close($ch);
        return ($code == 200 && $res) ? $res : false;
    }
    $ctx = stream_context_create(['http' => ['timeout' => 10]]);
    $res = @file_get_contents($url, false, $ctx);
    return $res ?: false;
}

// TR ve EN URL oluştur
function tmdb_url($path, $api_key, $lang = 'tr-TR') {
    return "https://api.themoviedb.org/3/{$path}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang}";
}

header('Content-Type: application/json');

if ($type == 3) {
    // BÖLÜM
    $season  = intval($_POST['season']);
    $episode = intval($_POST['episode']);
    $path    = "tv/{$tmdb_id}/season/{$season}/episode/{$episode}";
    $append  = "&append_to_response=credits,images,videos";

    $json = fetch_tmdb(tmdb_url($path, $api_key) . $append);
    if (!$json) die(json_encode(['error' => 'TMDB API\'ye ulaşılamadı.']));
    $data = json_decode($json, true);

    // TR boşsa EN fallback
    $fallback_fields = ['name', 'overview'];
    $need_en = false;
    foreach ($fallback_fields as $f) {
        if (empty($data[$f])) { $need_en = true; break; }
    }
    if ($need_en) {
        $json_en = fetch_tmdb(tmdb_url($path, $api_key, 'en-US') . $append);
        if ($json_en) {
            $en = json_decode($json_en, true);
            foreach ($fallback_fields as $f) {
                if (empty($data[$f]) && !empty($en[$f])) $data[$f] = $en[$f];
            }
            if (empty($data['still_path']) && !empty($en['still_path'])) $data['still_path'] = $en['still_path'];
        }
    }

    echo json_encode($data); exit;
}

// DİZİ ANA (type=1) veya SEZON (type=2)
$append = "credits,images,videos,external_ids,content_ratings,watch/providers";
$path   = "tv/{$tmdb_id}";

$json = fetch_tmdb(tmdb_url($path, $api_key) . "&append_to_response={$append}");
if (!$json) die(json_encode(['error' => 'TMDB API\'ye ulaşılamadı veya geçersiz ID.']));
$data = json_decode($json, true);

// TR boşsa EN fallback - tüm önemli alanlar
$fallback_fields = ['name', 'overview', 'tagline', 'poster_path', 'backdrop_path',
                    'status', 'type', 'homepage', 'genres', 'networks', 'created_by',
                    'production_companies', 'production_countries'];
$need_en = false;
foreach (['name', 'overview'] as $f) {
    if (empty($data[$f])) { $need_en = true; break; }
}
if ($need_en) {
    $json_en = fetch_tmdb(tmdb_url($path, $api_key, 'en-US') . "&append_to_response={$append}");
    if ($json_en) {
        $en = json_decode($json_en, true);
        foreach ($fallback_fields as $f) {
            if (empty($data[$f]) && !empty($en[$f])) $data[$f] = $en[$f];
        }
    }
}

// Logo (clearart) - images.logos'tan al
$logo_path = '';
if (!empty($data['images']['logos'])) {
    // Önce TR, yoksa EN logo bul
    foreach ($data['images']['logos'] as $logo) {
        if ($logo['iso_639_1'] === 'tr' && !empty($logo['file_path'])) {
            $logo_path = $logo['file_path']; break;
        }
    }
    if (empty($logo_path)) {
        foreach ($data['images']['logos'] as $logo) {
            if ($logo['iso_639_1'] === 'en' && !empty($logo['file_path'])) {
                $logo_path = $logo['file_path']; break;
            }
        }
    }
    if (empty($logo_path)) {
        $logo_path = $data['images']['logos'][0]['file_path'] ?? '';
    }
}
if (!empty($logo_path)) {
    $data['logo_path'] = 'https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/original' . $logo_path;
}

// Watch providers - TR için
$watch_tr = '';
if (!empty($data['watch/providers']['results']['TR'])) {
    $wp = $data['watch/providers']['results']['TR'];
    $providers = [];
    foreach (['flatrate', 'buy', 'rent', 'free', 'ads'] as $type_wp) {
        if (!empty($wp[$type_wp])) {
            foreach ($wp[$type_wp] as $p) {
                if (!in_array($p['provider_name'], $providers)) {
                    $providers[] = $p['provider_name'];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    $watch_tr = implode(', ', $providers);
}
if (!empty($watch_tr)) $data['watch_providers_tr'] = $watch_tr;

// Content ratings - TR yaş sınırı
if (!empty($data['content_ratings']['results'])) {
    $rating = '';
    foreach ($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $r) {
        if ($r['iso_3166_1'] === 'TR') { $rating = $r['rating']; break; }
    }
    if (empty($rating)) {
        foreach ($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $r) {
            if ($r['iso_3166_1'] === 'US') { $rating = $r['rating']; break; }
        }
    }
    if (!empty($rating)) $data['age_limit'] = $rating;
}

// Credits - cast ve crew
if (!empty($data['credits']['cast'])) {
    $data['cast'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, array_slice($data['credits']['cast'], 0, 15)));
}
if (!empty($data['credits']['crew'])) {
    $creators = array_filter($data['credits']['crew'], function($c) {
        return in_array($c['job'], ['Creator', 'Executive Producer', 'Showrunner']);
    });
    if (!empty($creators)) {
        $data['created_by_crew'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, array_slice(array_values($creators), 0, 3)));
    }
}

// created_by düzelt
if (!empty($data['created_by']) && is_array($data['created_by'])) {
    $data['created_by'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, $data['created_by']));
}

// genres
if (!empty($data['genres']) && is_array($data['genres'])) {
    $data['genres'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($g) { return $g['name']; }, $data['genres']));
}

// networks
if (!empty($data['networks']) && is_array($data['networks'])) {
    $data['networks'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($n) { return $n['name']; }, $data['networks']));
}

// production_companies
if (!empty($data['production_companies']) && is_array($data['production_companies'])) {
    $data['production_companies'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($p) { return $p['name']; }, $data['production_companies']));
}

// production_countries
if (!empty($data['production_countries']) && is_array($data['production_countries'])) {
    $data['production_countries'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($p) { return $p['name']; }, $data['production_countries']));
}

// spoken_languages
if (!empty($data['spoken_languages']) && is_array($data['spoken_languages'])) {
    $data['spoken_languages'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($l) { return $l['english_name'] ?: $l['name']; }, $data['spoken_languages']));
}

// origin_country
if (!empty($data['origin_country']) && is_array($data['origin_country'])) {
    $data['origin_country'] = implode(', ', $data['origin_country']);
}

// Trailer
if (!empty($data['videos']['results'])) {
    foreach ($data['videos']['results'] as $v) {
        if ($v['site'] === 'YouTube' && $v['type'] === 'Trailer') {
            $data['trailer_url']   = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=' . $v['key'];
            $data['trailer_embed'] = '<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/' . $v['key'] . '" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>';
            break;
        }
    }
}

// next_episode_to_air ve last_episode_to_air - okunabilir format
if (!empty($data['next_episode_to_air'])) {
    $nep = $data['next_episode_to_air'];
    $data['next_episode_to_air'] = 'S'.(isset($nep['season_number'])?$nep['season_number']:'?').' B'.(isset($nep['episode_number'])?$nep['episode_number']:'?').(!empty($nep['air_date']) ? ' ('.$nep['air_date'].')' : '').(!empty($nep['name']) ? ' - '.$nep['name'] : '');
}
if (!empty($data['last_episode_to_air'])) {
    $lep = $data['last_episode_to_air'];
    $data['last_episode_to_air'] = 'S'.(isset($lep['season_number'])?$lep['season_number']:'?').' B'.(isset($lep['episode_number'])?$lep['episode_number']:'?').(!empty($lep['air_date']) ? ' ('.$lep['air_date'].')' : '').(!empty($lep['name']) ? ' - '.$lep['name'] : '');
}

// adult
$data['adult'] = !empty($data['adult']) ? 'Evet' : 'Hayır';

// first_air_date yıl
if (!empty($data['first_air_date'])) {
    $data['year'] = substr($data['first_air_date'], 0, 4);
}

// in_production
$data['in_production'] = !empty($data['in_production']) ? 'Devam Ediyor' : 'Tamamlandı';

echo json_encode($data);
?>

    }
    if (empty($logo_path)) {
        $logo_path = $data['images']['logos'][0]['file_path'] ?? '';
    }
}
if (!empty($logo_path)) {
    $data['logo_path'] = 'https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/original' . $logo_path;
}

// Watch providers - TR için
$watch_tr = '';
if (!empty($data['watch/providers']['results']['TR'])) {
    $wp = $data['watch/providers']['results']['TR'];
    $providers = [];
    foreach (['flatrate', 'buy', 'rent', 'free', 'ads'] as $type_wp) {
        if (!empty($wp[$type_wp])) {
            foreach ($wp[$type_wp] as $p) {
                if (!in_array($p['provider_name'], $providers)) {
                    $providers[] = $p['provider_name'];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    $watch_tr = implode(', ', $providers);
}
if (!empty($watch_tr)) $data['watch_providers_tr'] = $watch_tr;

// Content ratings - TR yaş sınırı
if (!empty($data['content_ratings']['results'])) {
    $rating = '';
    foreach ($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $r) {
        if ($r['iso_3166_1'] === 'TR') { $rating = $r['rating']; break; }
    }
    if (empty($rating)) {
        foreach ($data['content_ratings']['results'] as $r) {
            if ($r['iso_3166_1'] === 'US') { $rating = $r['rating']; break; }
        }
    }
    if (!empty($rating)) $data['age_limit'] = $rating;
}

// Credits - cast ve crew
if (!empty($data['credits']['cast'])) {
    $data['cast'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, array_slice($data['credits']['cast'], 0, 15)));
}
if (!empty($data['credits']['crew'])) {
    $creators = array_filter($data['credits']['crew'], function($c) {
        return in_array($c['job'], ['Creator', 'Executive Producer', 'Showrunner']);
    });
    if (!empty($creators)) {
        $data['created_by_crew'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, array_slice(array_values($creators), 0, 3)));
    }
}

// created_by düzelt
if (!empty($data['created_by']) && is_array($data['created_by'])) {
    $data['created_by'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($c) { return $c['name']; }, $data['created_by']));
}

// genres
if (!empty($data['genres']) && is_array($data['genres'])) {
    $data['genres'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($g) { return $g['name']; }, $data['genres']));
}

// networks
if (!empty($data['networks']) && is_array($data['networks'])) {
    $data['networks'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($n) { return $n['name']; }, $data['networks']));
}

// production_companies
if (!empty($data['production_companies']) && is_array($data['production_companies'])) {
    $data['production_companies'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($p) { return $p['name']; }, $data['production_companies']));
}

// production_countries
if (!empty($data['production_countries']) && is_array($data['production_countries'])) {
    $data['production_countries'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($p) { return $p['name']; }, $data['production_countries']));
}

// spoken_languages
if (!empty($data['spoken_languages']) && is_array($data['spoken_languages'])) {
    $data['spoken_languages'] = implode(', ', array_map(function($l) { return $l['english_name'] ?: $l['name']; }, $data['spoken_languages']));
}

// origin_country
if (!empty($data['origin_country']) && is_array($data['origin_country'])) {
    $data['origin_country'] = implode(', ', $data['origin_country']);
}

// Trailer
if (!empty($data['videos']['results'])) {
    foreach ($data['videos']['results'] as $v) {
        if ($v['site'] === 'YouTube' && $v['type'] === 'Trailer') {
            $data['trailer_url']   = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=' . $v['key'];
            $data['trailer_embed'] = '<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/' . $v['key'] . '" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen></iframe>';
            break;
        }
    }
}

// next_episode_to_air ve last_episode_to_air - okunabilir format
if (!empty($data['next_episode_to_air'])) {
    $nep = $data['next_episode_to_air'];
    $data['next_episode_to_air'] = 'S'.(isset($nep['season_number'])?$nep['season_number']:'?').' B'.(isset($nep['episode_number'])?$nep['episode_number']:'?').(!empty($nep['air_date']) ? ' ('.$nep['air_date'].')' : '').(!empty($nep['name']) ? ' - '.$nep['name'] : '');
}
if (!empty($data['last_episode_to_air'])) {
    $lep = $data['last_episode_to_air'];
    $data['last_episode_to_air'] = 'S'.(isset($lep['season_number'])?$lep['season_number']:'?').' B'.(isset($lep['episode_number'])?$lep['episode_number']:'?').(!empty($lep['air_date']) ? ' ('.$lep['air_date'].')' : '').(!empty($lep['name']) ? ' - '.$lep['name'] : '');
}

// adult
$data['adult'] = !empty($data['adult']) ? 'Evet' : 'Hayır';

// first_air_date yıl
if (!empty($data['first_air_date'])) {
    $data['year'] = substr($data['first_air_date'], 0, 4);
}

// in_production
$data['in_production'] = !empty($data['in_production']) ? 'Devam Ediyor' : 'Tamamlandı';

echo json_encode($data);
?>
// DLE Real Series PRO - Paneli Kategori ile Kısa İçerik arasına bas echo $series_panel;

'/data/series_config.php') ? include(ENGINE_DIR . '/data/series_config.php') : []; $xf_poster = isset($s_conf['xf_map']['poster_path']) ? $s_conf['xf_map']['poster_path'] : 'poster'; // 1. operation.searchcode: $db->query( "SELECT id, date, short_story, xfields, title, category, alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_post WHERE id IN(". RELATED_IDS .") AND approve=1 ORDER BY FIND_IN_SET(id, '". RELATED_IDS ."') LIMIT " . $config['related_number'] );
operation.replacecode: // DLE Real Series PRO - is_series, series_season ve series_episode eklendi $db->query( "SELECT id, date, short_story, xfields, title, category, alt_name, is_series, series_season, series_episode FROM " . PREFIX . "_post WHERE id IN(". RELATED_IDS .") AND approve=1 ORDER BY FIND_IN_SET(id, '". RELATED_IDS ."') LIMIT " . $config['related_number'] );

'DLE bulunamadı'])); } // DLE config ve DB yükle require_once ENGINE_DIR . '/data/dbconfig.php'; require_once ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/mysql.class.php'; $db = new db(); $db->connect($cfg_server, $cfg_user, $cfg_pass, $cfg_name, '', $cfg_charset ?? 'utf8mb4'); define('PREFIX', $cfg_table_prefix ?? 'dle'); // DLE site config $config = []; $res = $db->query("SELECT var, val FROM " . PREFIX . "_config"); while ($r = $db->get_row($res)) { $config[$r['var']] = $r['val']; } // DLE üyesi simüle et (cron için minimal) $member_id = [ 'name' => 'Cron', 'user_id' => 1, 'user_group' => 1, ]; define('DATALIFEENGINE', true); } // ============================================================ // Config yükle // ============================================================ $config_path = ENGINE_DIR . '/data/series_config.php'; if (!file_exists($config_path)) { die(json_encode(['error' => 'series_config.php bulunamadı. Eklenti ayarlarını kaydedin.'])); } $s_conf = include $config_path; $api_key = isset($s_conf['tmdb_api_key']) ? trim($s_conf['tmdb_api_key']) : ''; $cron_key = isset($s_conf['cron_key']) ? trim($s_conf['cron_key']) : ''; $cron_on = isset($s_conf['cron_enable']) ? intval($s_conf['cron_enable']) : 0; $xf_map = isset($s_conf['xf_map']) ? $s_conf['xf_map'] : []; $approve = isset($s_conf['pub_status']) ? intval($s_conf['pub_status']) : 0; // Cron'da varsayılan: taslak $cast_limit = isset($s_conf['api_cast_limit']) ? intval($s_conf['api_cast_limit']) : 15; $lang_fb = isset($s_conf['api_lang_fallback']) ? $s_conf['api_lang_fallback'] : 'en-US'; $tpl_ep = !empty($s_conf['seo_episode']) ? $s_conf['seo_episode'] : '{title} {season}. Sezon {episode}. Bölüm'; $tpl_sn = !empty($s_conf['seo_season']) ? $s_conf['seo_season'] : '{title} {season}. Sezon'; // ============================================================ // Güvenlik Kontrolü // ============================================================ $req_key = isset($_GET['key']) ? trim($_GET['key']) : ''; if (empty($cron_key) || $req_key !== $cron_key) { http_response_code(403); die(json_encode(['error' => 'Geçersiz Cron Key'])); } if (!$cron_on) { die(json_encode(['status' => 'disabled', 'msg' => 'Cron motoru kapalı. Ayarlar panelinden aktif edin.'])); } if (empty($api_key)) { die(json_encode(['error' => 'TMDB API Key eksik.'])); } header('Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8'); // ============================================================ // Yardımcı Fonksiyonlar // ============================================================ function cron_fetch($url) { if (function_exists('curl_init')) { $ch = curl_init($url); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, 20); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_SSL_VERIFYPEER, false); curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_USERAGENT, 'Mozilla/5.0'); $r = curl_exec($ch); $code = curl_getinfo($ch, CURLINFO_HTTP_CODE); curl_close($ch); return ($code == 200 && $r) ? $r : false; } $ctx = stream_context_create(['http' => ['timeout' => 20]]); return @file_get_contents($url, false, $ctx) ?: false; } function cron_fetch_tmdb($path, $api_key, $lang = 'tr-TR') { global $lang_fb; $url = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3/{$path}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang}"; $res = json_decode(cron_fetch($url), true); // Kritik alanlar boşsa fallback dilde tekrar çek if (!empty($lang_fb) && $lang === 'tr-TR') { $needs_fb = false; foreach (['name', 'overview'] as $f) { if (empty($res[$f])) { $needs_fb = true; break; } } if ($needs_fb) { $url_fb = "https://api.themoviedb.org/3/{$path}?api_key={$api_key}&language={$lang_fb}"; $res_fb = json_decode(cron_fetch($url_fb), true); foreach (['name', 'overview', 'still_path'] as $f) { if (empty($res[$f]) && !empty($res_fb[$f])) $res[$f] = $res_fb[$f]; } } } return $res; } function cron_process_img($tmdb_path) { global $s_conf, $config; if (empty($tmdb_path)) return ''; $size = !empty($s_conf['img_size']) ? $s_conf['img_size'] : 'original'; $tmdb_url = "https://image.tmdb.org/t/p/{$size}{$tmdb_path}"; if (!empty($s_conf['img_download'])) { $save_dir = !empty($s_conf['img_path']) ? trim($s_conf['img_path'], '/') . '/' : 'uploads/posts/series/'; $full_dir = ABSOLUTE_PATH . $save_dir; if (!is_dir($full_dir)) { @mkdir($full_dir, 0777, true); @chmod($full_dir, 0777); } $ext = pathinfo($tmdb_path, PATHINFO_EXTENSION) ?: 'jpg'; $filename = 'tmdb_' . substr(md5($tmdb_path), 0, 12) . '.' . $ext; $savepath = $full_dir . $filename; if (!file_exists($savepath)) { $data = cron_fetch($tmdb_url); if ($data) file_put_contents($savepath, $data); } if (file_exists($savepath) && filesize($savepath) > 0) { // DLE native thumbnail sınıfı ile watermark uygula if (!empty($s_conf['img_watermark'])) { $thumb_class = ENGINE_DIR . '/classes/thumb.class.php'; if (file_exists($thumb_class)) { require_once $thumb_class; $thumb = new thumbnail($savepath); $thumb->insert_watermark($config['max_watermark'] ?? ''); $result = $thumb->save($savepath); if ($result) $filename = basename($result); } } return $config['http_home_url'] . $save_dir . $filename; } } return $tmdb_url; } function cron_safe_xf($v) { if (is_array($v)) $v = implode(', ', $v); return str_replace(['|', "\r", "\n"], ['|', '', '
'], trim($v)); } function cron_make_title($tpl, $dizi_name, $season = 0, $episode = 0) { return trim(str_replace( ['{title}', '{season}', '{episode}'], [$dizi_name, $season, $episode], $tpl )); } // ============================================================ // ANA MOTOR: Tüm "Returning Series" dizilerini tara // ============================================================ @set_time_limit(0); $start_time = microtime(true); $log = []; $total_added = 0; $total_checked = 0; // is_series=1 olan ve status=Returning Series xfield'ı taşıyan dizileri bul $db->query("SELECT id, title, xfields FROM " . PREFIX . "_post WHERE is_series = 1 AND approve = 1"); $diziler = []; while ($row = $db->get_row()) { $diziler[] = $row; } foreach ($diziler as $dizi) { // Sadece "Returning Series" durumundaki dizileri tara $xf_status = ''; if (!empty($xf_map['status'])) { if (preg_match('/' . preg_quote($xf_map['status'], '/') . '\|(.*?)(?:\|\||$)/', $dizi['xfields'], $sm)) { $xf_status = trim($sm[1]); } } // TMDB ID'yi al $tmdb_id = ''; if (preg_match('/series_tmdb_id\|(.*?)(?:\|\||$)/', $dizi['xfields'], $tm)) { $tmdb_id = trim($tm[1]); } if (empty($tmdb_id)) continue; // Status kontrolü — "Returning Series" değilse atla // (status xfield bağlı değilse API'dan kontrol et) $total_checked++; $dizi_name = stripslashes($dizi['title']); $dizi_id = intval($dizi['id']); $log_entry = ['dizi' => $dizi_name, 'tmdb_id' => $tmdb_id, 'added' => 0, 'skipped' => 0]; // TMDB'den dizinin güncel bilgisini çek $tv = cron_fetch_tmdb("tv/{$tmdb_id}", $api_key); if (empty($tv) || empty($tv['seasons'])) { $log_entry['note'] = 'TMDB verisi alınamadı'; $log[] = $log_entry; continue; } // Status kontrolü $tv_status = isset($tv['status']) ? $tv['status'] : ''; if (!in_array($tv_status, ['Returning Series', 'In Production', 'Planned'])) { $log_entry['note'] = "Atlandi: status={$tv_status}"; $log[] = $log_entry; continue; } // Her sezonu kontrol et foreach ($tv['seasons'] as $s) { if ($s['season_number'] == 0) continue; // Specials atla $sno = intval($s['season_number']); // Bu sezon DB'de var mı? $season_row = $db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_post WHERE series_parent='{$dizi_id}' AND series_season='{$sno}' AND is_series=2 LIMIT 1" ); // Sezon yoksa ekle if (!$season_row['id']) { $s_detail = cron_fetch_tmdb("tv/{$tmdb_id}/season/{$sno}", $api_key); $s_title = cron_make_title($tpl_sn, $dizi_name, $sno); $s_over = !empty($s_detail['overview']) ? $db->safesql($s_detail['overview']) : ''; $xf = "series_tmdb_id|{$tmdb_id}||"; if (!empty($xf_map['season_poster']) && !empty($s['poster_path'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['season_poster']}|" . cron_process_img($s['poster_path']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['season_year']) && !empty($s['air_date'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['season_year']}|" . substr($s['air_date'], 0, 4) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['season_overview']) && !empty($s_over)) $xf .= "{$xf_map['season_overview']}|" . cron_safe_xf(strip_tags($s_over)) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['season_episode_count']) && isset($s['episode_count'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['season_episode_count']}|" . intval($s['episode_count']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['season_vote_average']) && isset($s['vote_average'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['season_vote_average']}|" . cron_safe_xf($s['vote_average']) . "||"; $xf = rtrim($xf, "||"); $alt = totranslit($s_title, true, false); $db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_post (date,autor,short_story,full_story,title,xfields,is_series,series_parent,series_season,category,alt_name,approve,allow_comm,allow_main) " . "VALUES (NOW(),'" . $member_id['name'] . "','{$s_over}','{$s_over}','" . $db->safesql($s_title) . "','" . $db->safesql($xf) . "',2,'{$dizi_id}','{$sno}','" . intval($s['episode_count'] ?? 0) . "','{$alt}',{$approve},1,1)" ); $new_sid = $db->insert_id(); $db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_post_extras (news_id,user_id,allow_rate) VALUES ('{$new_sid}','{$member_id['user_id']}',1)"); $season_row['id'] = $new_sid; $log_entry['added']++; $total_added++; } // Sezon bölümlerini TMDB'den çek ve eksik olanları ekle $s_data = cron_fetch_tmdb("tv/{$tmdb_id}/season/{$sno}", $api_key); if (empty($s_data['episodes'])) continue; $parent_sid = intval($season_row['id']); foreach ($s_data['episodes'] as $ep) { $eno = intval($ep['episode_number']); // Yayınlanmamış bölümleri atla (air_date yoksa veya gelecekteyse) if (empty($ep['air_date'])) continue; if (strtotime($ep['air_date']) > time()) continue; // DB'de var mı? $chk = $db->super_query( "SELECT id FROM " . PREFIX . "_post WHERE series_parent='{$dizi_id}' AND series_season='{$sno}' AND series_episode='{$eno}' AND is_series=3 LIMIT 1" ); if ($chk['id']) { $log_entry['skipped']++; continue; } // Yeni bölüm — ekle $raw_title = cron_make_title($tpl_ep, $dizi_name, $sno, $eno); $title = $db->safesql($raw_title); $over = !empty($ep['overview']) ? $db->safesql($ep['overview']) : ''; $alt = totranslit($raw_title, true, false); $xf = "series_tmdb_id|{$tmdb_id}||"; if (!empty($xf_map['episode_image']) && !empty($ep['still_path'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['episode_image']}|" . cron_process_img($ep['still_path']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['episode_name']) && !empty($ep['name'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['episode_name']}|" . cron_safe_xf($ep['name']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['episode_year']) && !empty($ep['air_date'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['episode_year']}|" . substr($ep['air_date'], 0, 4) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['episode_vote']) && isset($ep['vote_average'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['episode_vote']}|" . cron_safe_xf($ep['vote_average']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['ep_vote_count']) && isset($ep['vote_count'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['ep_vote_count']}|" . intval($ep['vote_count']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['ep_runtime']) && !empty($ep['runtime'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['ep_runtime']}|" . intval($ep['runtime']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['ep_production_code']) && !empty($ep['production_code'])) $xf .= "{$xf_map['ep_production_code']}|" . cron_safe_xf($ep['production_code']) . "||"; if (!empty($xf_map['ep_guest_stars']) && !empty($ep['guest_stars'])) { $gs = array_map(function($g) { return $g['name']; }, array_slice($ep['guest_stars'], 0, $cast_limit)); if (!empty($gs)) $xf .= "{$xf_map['ep_guest_stars']}|" . cron_safe_xf(implode(', ', $gs)) . "||"; } if (!empty($xf_map['ep_crew']) && !empty($ep['crew'])) { $cr = array_map(function($c) { return $c['name'] . ' (' . $c['job'] . ')'; }, array_slice($ep['crew'], 0, 5)); if (!empty($cr)) $xf .= "{$xf_map['ep_crew']}|" . cron_safe_xf(implode(', ', $cr)) . "||"; } $xf = rtrim($xf, "||"); $cat = intval($tv['seasons'][0]['episode_count'] ?? 0); // kategori yok, 0 $db->query( "INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_post (date,autor,short_story,full_story,title,xfields,is_series,series_parent,series_season,series_episode,category,alt_name,approve,allow_comm,allow_main) " . "VALUES (NOW(),'" . $member_id['name'] . "','{$over}','{$over}','{$title}','" . $db->safesql($xf) . "',3,'{$dizi_id}','{$sno}','{$eno}','0','{$alt}',{$approve},1,1)" ); $new_eid = $db->insert_id(); $db->query("INSERT INTO " . PREFIX . "_post_extras (news_id,user_id,allow_rate) VALUES ('{$new_eid}','{$member_id['user_id']}',1)"); $log_entry['added']++; $total_added++; } } if ($log_entry['added'] > 0) clear_cache(); $log[] = $log_entry; } $elapsed = round(microtime(true) - $start_time, 2); echo json_encode([ 'success' => true, 'checked' => $total_checked, 'total_added' => $total_added, 'elapsed_sec' => $elapsed, 'log' => $log, ], JSON_UNESCAPED_UNICODE | JSON_PRETTY_PRINT); ?>

operation.searchcode: $db->query( "SELECT p.id, p.date, p.short_story, p.xfields, p.title, p.category, p.alt_name FROM " . PREFIX . "_post p LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_post_extras e ON (p.id=e.news_id) WHERE p.approve=1 AND p.date >= '$this_month' - INTERVAL 1 MONTH AND p.date < '$this_month' ORDER BY rating DESC, comm_num DESC, news_read DESC, date DESC LIMIT 0,{$config['top_number']}" );
operation.replacecode: // DLE Real Series PRO - is_series eklendi $db->query( "SELECT p.id, p.date, p.short_story, p.xfields, p.title, p.category, p.alt_name, p.is_series, p.series_season, p.series_episode FROM " . PREFIX . "_post p LEFT JOIN " . PREFIX . "_post_extras e ON (p.id=e.news_id) WHERE p.approve=1 AND p.date >= '$this_month' - INTERVAL 1 MONTH AND p.date < '$this_month' ORDER BY rating DESC, comm_num DESC, news_read DESC, date DESC LIMIT 0,{$config['top_number']}" );
